final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for the RAN QIU brand.

Style/medium: needs an "东方美学" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 宋画 landscape minimalism, 侘寂 (wabi-sabi) material poetry, 新中式 editorial photography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include generous negative space as a core visual element
Subject: must include the RAN QIU brand logo as a key element, combined with natural elements
Scene/backdrop: needs a warm autumn atmosphere — exact seasonal setting is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a "金色时光" golden-hour atmosphere with warm, poetic, serene mood — exact light quality is yours
Color palette: must use the brand colors #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown) as dominant tones
Materials/textures: needs natural, warm textures with shallow depth of field — exact material choices are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must preserve brand color accuracy (#8B3A1E, #E8DCCB, #D4A574), generous留白 throughout
Avoid:
